title: Monitor water supplies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor water supplies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor water supplies

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect water supplies routinely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect water supplies routinely.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report potential blockages and clear actual blockages.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reposition intake lines as necessary to ensure unobstructed suction.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear debris and sludge from strainers.
